title: Curse of Darkness
description: Pure Darkness can you still beat the game when you can't see 4 blocks in front of you?
body:
Imagine A world where darkness follows you. You cannot escape it. Everything will be consumed and erased by the shadows of the curse.This mod makes the game Irrationally dark and scary you need to make a Elixer of light to brighten up the world back to normal but once that elixer runs out the darkness will return. This can be used in multiplayer and will be able to see your Friends, Or Enemies.

This mod is welcomed into modpacks and I encourage you to leave feedback with bugs and if you have beaten the game with it.
